app.title: Notifier
app.subtitle: The web client can already register a user, sign in, and manage notes and reminders through the API.
app.name: Name
app.registered: Account created. You can keep going.
app.newItemHint: A plain note or a reminder with a date.
app.itemBodyPlaceholder: Extra details, links, address, or a short checklist.
app.itemsEmpty: No items yet. Create your first note or reminder.
app.authRequired: Sign in first to create items.
app.syncHint: This profile is already shaped for the next sync steps across web, desktop, and Telegram.
app.syncWindowHint: The filter helps you review notes, reminders, and recently changed records before sync.

validation.name: Name must be at least 2 characters long.
validation.password: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
validation.itemTitle: Item title must be at least 2 characters long.
